name: python3-greenlet
title: python3-greenlet
description:
Lightweight in-process concurrent programming (python3)
The greenlet package is a spin-off of Stackless, a version of CPython that
supports micro-threads called "tasklets". Tasklets run pseudo-concurrently
(typically in a single or a few OS-level threads) and are synchronized with
data exchanges on "channels".
.
greenlet is the standalone package derived from the py lib, and is used by
several non-blocking IO packages as a more flexible alternative to Python's
built in coroutines.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-greenlet because Lightweight in-process concurrent programming (python3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-greenlet as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-greenlet with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-greenlet --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
